titleStmt.title: SII 15.190: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 190. (B.K. No. 53 of 1929-30.) PHAḌEKNŪR, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a Nandi pillar standing near the Hanumān temple.
1. Śaka 1178, Naḷa, Śrāvaṇa śu. pavitrārōpaṇa, (i.e. 15), Thursday. This corresponds to 1256 A.D., August 17, the weekday being Monday.
2. The 11th regnal year of the king, Naḷa, Phālguna ba. 15, Saturday. This regularly corresponds to 1257 A.D., March 17.

It is stated that on the first date the king witnessed the great festival of Pavitrārōpaṇa, evidently of the god Rāmanātha. On the second date was made the gift of the village Paḍiyakanūr to the above-named god at Sonnaligeyapura by Dēsiya-daṇḍanāyaka of Kannaḍa Four Thousand. The epigraph commences with the well known vachana of Siddharāma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ jaya paramēsvara paramātma Īśvara
nu¨rvvīpa¨rvvi Aḍaṁgikoṁḍi¨rppavō¨rbba
ṁṇige Āgi yōgigaḷa manada kone
ya jyōtīsvaranuṁ vriśabhana rūpāgi ya
jamānanuṁ Ācā¨ryyanuṁ tāne Ā
gi yōgādi saṁpaṁnna khaḷeyaṁgaḷe
llavaṁ saṁpādisi yōgaramaṇiya kṣētra
mane sthaḷaviṭṭu salākheviḍidu Abhinava śrīśai
ḷavane māḍi kapilasiddhamallikā
¨rjjunadēvane nelasi niṁdu puṁṇya pā
paṁgaḷaṁ baraṁ pēḷdu besaṁ pēḷuttiralu
yēṁ besaṁ dēvā Enuttiralu yī sthā
nadalu mānyavāgidda vūrugaḷaṁ bhū
migaḷaṁ dhanaṁgaḷaṁ Ī liṁgakke hastōda
kavaṁ māḍi koṭṭudaṁ manaṁ pēsade ka
ḷedukoṁḍahenaṁbātana Ātana mā
tā māteya pitrugaḷellamaṁ Eppattēḷu
kōṭi varusaṁbaraṁ puḷugoṁḍada na
rakadoḷagikki nīnāhutigoḷuttiru gaṁ
ḍā Ele pāpavē yī dēvana bhūmi dhanakkā
naṁjuveneṁdu paṁdeya pāvaḍa¨rddaṁte
manaṁ bedaṟi poḍavaṭṭanaṁ bēga sī
ghraṁ koṁḍu bā kaṁḍā . Ele puṁṇya
vē kaviḷāsake yiṁteraḍaṟa beṁge
puṇyapāpaṁgaḷu pā¨rddukoṁḍoyvu
du tappadu diṭhadiṭha satyaṁ gaṁḍi
re Eṁba Ājñāvacana niyāmadiṁ
racisida Anādisiddhanuṁ jagatpra
siddhanuṁ Aṇimagarimalaghi
mamahimaprācya prākāvya Īśatva
vasitvameṁba Aṣṭamādiguṇaisva
[¨ryya]saṁpaṁnanuṁ bēḷva bhaktajana
manōnnatakaḷāprasaṁnanuṁ
karaṇaṁ visuddhaharaṇaṁ vahni[¨rvvi]
nā jvaḷanuṁ nāḍibhāḷanuṁ nādabiṁ
duddhaninaṁ dēhasya saṁkrāma
ṇaṁ Ātmajyōtinida¨rṣaṇa svacchaṁ
da mrituṁjameṁba dasapra
tyayaprabuddhanuṁ siddhakuḷavā¨rdhiva¨rddhana
sudhākaranuṁ lōkavellavaṁ Ē
kākāramaṁmāḷpeneṁba śuddha
bāṇamaṁ rāma
kuddāḷanuṁ krōdhavidhvaṁsakanu
bhava[A]rigamūḷanāḷōtpāṭanamō
hani¨rmmūḷachēdananuṁ kedarūḍe
raṇa nanuṁ mābbariyadoṁ
¨ryyanuṁ nelasi sva¨rggama¨rtyapātāḷa
ḷōkyamaṁ pāvana māḍi
paramārādhyanuṁ vēda vēdānta bhēṣajya
ṁ sthēyasamatāguṇamaṁ sāṁkhyata
thamaṁ bauddhasudhātmateyaṁ jai
najitāpaṁ dha¨rmmavumaṁ cā¨rvvā
driṣṭōpanyāsamaṁ mīmāṁśakavicā
racātu¨ryyamaṁ puduṁgoḷsi
rūpamumaṁ niyāmisi Aikya
vumaṁ taṁna suta¨rgge pasariṭṭa lōkaikanā
thananipa siddhēṁdra cakrava¨rtti śrī rā
manāthadēva viracita kṣētrapratipāḷaka .
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdāḷaṁ
krita śrīmadvijayakaṭakanivāsa
dvārāvatīpuravarādhīsvara viṣṇuvaṁ
śōdbhava yādavakuḷakamaḷaka
ḷikāvikāsabhāskare mūḷavīmalla Ari
rāyavurasella gū¨rjjaravāraṇāṁkusa teluṁgarā
ya siraḥkamaḷanāḷamūḷōtpāṭanapunarapisthā
panācā¨ryya haṁmīrarāyani¨rmmūḷachēda
naṁ bhūdu¨rgga giridu¨rgga jaladu¨rgga vanadu¨rgga pramu
khyanānādu¨rgga vidrāvaṇa suva¨rṇnakī¨rtti
guruḍadhvaja śrīmatu prauḍhapratāpa cakra
va¨rtti śrīkaṁhnaradēvavijaya rājyōdayē śrī
matu sakava¨rṣa 1178 neya naḷa saṁvatsa
rada śrāvaṇa śuddha brahaspativāra pa
vitrārōpaṇa mahōtsavamaṁ kaṁḍu matigoṁ
ḍu bhaktiyiṁda © svasti samastaprasasti
hitaṁ śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa
prauḍhapratāpa cakrava¨rtti kaṁnnaharadēva
vijayarājyada 11 neya naḷa saṁvatsara
phālguṇa bahuḷa 15 sanivāradaṁdu
śrīmatu basurikōḍa mahāprabhu sara
ṇāgatavajrapaṁjara praṇūtarakṣāma
ṇi kaṁnnaḍanalku sāsira dēsiya daṁḍa
nāyaka taṁnnadhikārada hāgiluha
nneṟaḍaṟoḷagaṇa paḍiyakanūra nūla
rasaru soṁnaligeyapurada śrī rā
manāthadēvarige sa¨rvvanamasyadiṁ dharāpū
[¨rvva]kavāgi biṭṭa datti . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī
Digital edition of SII 15.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
